title: Repurposed Structures - Cobblemon Compat
description: Pokecenters and berry farms in Repurposed Structures Villages!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Cobblemon. You will find their berry Farms and even Pokecenters in RS's Villages! The Pokecenter design is taken from 1.21.1 Cobblemon and backported to this 1.20.1 datapack. The berry farms have a specific selection of berries that visually thematically fits each village's looks!


Cobblemon mod can be obtained from here:
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)


Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here:
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge)
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)
